$schema-note: Generic config for doc-sync-gate.cjs. Commit-time WARN + per-edit WARN (advisory — every path exits 0, never blocks) when a behavioral code change in an ENFORCED area ships without touching its tech-free 8-section Feature Spec. Project-specific enforced areas are loaded from docs/project-config.json -> workflowPatterns.docSyncGate.enforcedAreas. Areas NOT listed there fast-exit (allow) — the gate is opt-in per area.

fastExit.comment: Any staged/edited path matching these is treated as non-behavioral (docs, tooling, tests, generated, migrations) and never triggers the gate.
